We design and build world-class digital products.

A partnership built on craft, speed, and shared ambition.

Shared at

9 June 2026

Created by

Rui Sereno

O ponto de viragem

O site nao esta velho. Esta a tornar-vos invisiveis.

A abordagem

Começamos pelo que vos torna invisíveis.

Antes de desenhar seja o que for, percebemos porque é que o que está hoje não está a funcionar.

Mapeamos onde a procura existe e onde ainda não estais presentes. Cruzamos dados de pesquisa com o comportamento real dos utilizadores para perceber onde o interesse aparece e onde se perde. Identificamos o que a concorrência está a fazer bem, o que está a ignorar, e onde os utilizadores chegam ao vosso site e saem sem converter. Este mapeamento revela as lacunas que um redesenho bem dirigido consegue fechar. Só depois deste trabalho é que sabemos o que construir e porquê. A diferença entre um site que converte e um que não converte raramente está no design. Está no entendimento de quem chega, o que procura, e o que o faz ficar.

image

Esta análise é o mapa que guia todas as decisões seguintes -- do que se mostra em primeiro lugar ao que se mantém fora do caminho crítico.

The craft behind the product

We work in the open, at every stage.

Every sprint ends with something real to look at. No status reports, no intermediary layers -- just the product, live, in your browser.

Product in motion

The full flow, from first click to checkout.

Recorded on the working prototype. Every interaction you see is real -- no mocks, no smoke and mirrors.

Our track record

The numbers behind the work.

A fixed-scope engagement with no surprises. Every deliverable is defined upfront and signed off before work begins.

96%

On-time delivery rate

Across 478 engagements since 2018, measured against the agreed deadline at kickoff.

4.9

Average App Store rating

Across all mobile products shipped in the last three years.

12

Years building digital products

From early-stage startups to enterprise platforms across Europe and North America.

3×

Average return on design investment

Based on client-reported outcomes 12 months after launch.

Our commitments

What you can count on.

A fixed-scope engagement with no surprises. Every deliverable is defined upfront and signed off before work begins.

A single point of contact

One product lead accountable for delivery from kickoff to handoff. No account managers, no delegation chains.

Weekly progress demos

Every sprint ends with a live demo. You see real, working product — not status updates in a slide.

No surprises on scope

Scope is agreed in writing before work begins. Any change is flagged before it affects the timeline or budget.

Post-launch support included

We remain on standby for four weeks after launch to address anything that comes up in the real world.

The return on good design

The math speaks for itself.

A fixed-scope engagement with no surprises. Every deliverable is defined upfront and signed off before work begins.

120M

Average return on design investment

Across client engagements since 2018.

Industry failure rate

Most digital products don't survive.

Only 4 in 100 digital products launched in the last decade are still in active use today.

Products launched10.000 Abandoned within 2 years96%

4%

Still in active use after 2 years

The industry's default outcome is abandonment.

Why Significa

Not all partners are built the same.

Most agencies can execute. Few can think. Here's how we compare.

Criteria Significa Boutique Agency Freelancer

Strategy & product definition

Ability to shape what gets built, not just how

Full ownership

From brief to roadmap — we define the product with you

Sometimes

Depends heavily on the agency's seniority

Rarely

Typically scoped to execution only

UX research & validation

User interviews, testing, and insight synthesis

Built in

Every project begins with structured discovery

Optional add-on

Often skipped to reduce cost

Not available

Outside the typical scope of a single contributor

Design system delivery

Scalable component library ready for handoff

Always included

Tokens, components, and documentation as standard

Varies

Quality depends on the team assigned

Unlikely

Adds time and complexity most freelancers avoid

Full-stack engineering

Frontend, backend, infrastructure, and QA

End to end

One team across the full stack, no handoffs

Often split

Design and engineering may be separate teams

Specialised only

A single person rarely covers the full stack

Single point of contact

One lead accountable for the full engagement

Always

A dedicated product lead owns delivery end to end

Sometimes

Account managers often sit between you and the team

Yes

But also the only person — no backup or escalation path

Post-launch continuity

Support, iteration, and ownership after go-live

Included

We stay on for a post-launch period and long-term retainers

Extra cost

Usually requires a separate retainer agreement

Uncertain

Availability after delivery is never guaranteed

What's included

Everything you need, nothing you don't.

A fixed-scope engagement with no surprises. Every deliverable is defined upfront and signed off before work begins.

Deliverable Included

Product strategy & roadmap

Yes

Structured discovery workshop and a prioritised feature roadmap

UX research & user interviews

Yes

3 rounds of user interviews with synthesis and insight report

High-fidelity UI design

Yes

Fully resolved screens for all core flows, desktop and mobile

Design system

Yes

Component library with tokens and documentation, ready for handoff

Frontend & backend development

Yes

Production-ready code across the full stack, no handoffs

Post-launch support

4 weeks

Dedicated support window after go-live to address any issues

Scope of work

What we will build.

We start every engagement by building a shared understanding of the problem. Through structured workshops, stakeholder interviews and a technical audit, we define the product vision, identify constraints and align on what success looks like.

This phase is the foundation everything else is built on. Getting it right means the rest of the project moves faster, with fewer surprises and a team that is genuinely aligned on what matters.

Deliverables

Stakeholder interviews

Structured sessions to align on goals and constraints.

Technical audit

Assessment of existing systems and integration requirements.

Product roadmap

Prioritised feature list with success metrics defined.

Team

Strategist

Facilitates workshops and defines the product roadmap.

UX Researcher

Conducts interviews and synthesises findings.

Design is where the product takes shape. We move from rough concepts to a fully resolved interface — information architecture, interaction design, visual language and a component system that scales. Every decision is grounded in user needs and validated through iteration.

You will see and respond to real work throughout, not at the end. We share progress weekly, incorporate feedback continuously, and make sure nothing ships that has not been reviewed and approved by your team.

Deliverables

Information architecture

Sitemap, user flows and navigation structure.

High-fidelity UI

Fully resolved screens for all core flows.

Design system

Component library with tokens, ready for handoff.

Prototype

Interactive clickable prototype for stakeholder review.

Team

Product Designer

Leads visual design, UI and the design system.

UX Designer

Owns information architecture and interaction design.

We build in short cycles, shipping working software every week. Design and engineering operate in the same loop — no handoff, no silos. The codebase is production-ready from day one: tested, documented and built to last.

We integrate with your existing systems and keep you in the loop at every step. Every sprint ends with a demo, and every decision is documented so you always understand what was built and why.

Deliverables

Frontend

Production-ready UI built against the design system.

Backend & API

Server-side logic, database and third-party integrations.

QA & testing

End-to-end test suite covering critical paths.

Team

Frontend Engineer

Builds the UI layer and integrates with APIs.

Backend Engineer

Architects and implements the server-side logic.

QA Engineer

Defines test plans and ensures quality at every step.

Launch is not the end — it is the beginning of the product's life. We manage the full deployment, set up monitoring and alerts, and make sure your team is confident operating what we have built together.

After go-live, we remain available for a period of post-launch support to address anything that comes up. We treat launch not as the end of the engagement but as the start of the product's life in the real world.

Deliverables

Deployment

Production environment setup with CI/CD pipeline.

Monitoring

Error tracking, uptime alerts and performance dashboards.

Documentation

Technical and user-facing documentation for the team.

Team

DevOps Engineer

Manages deployment pipelines and infrastructure.

Product Lead

Coordinates handoff, training and post-launch support.

The real odds

Most digital products don't survive.

Building something is the easy part. Most products ship, get used briefly, and quietly disappear. The ones that don't are built differently — with more rigour, sharper focus, and the right partner from day one.

4 in 100 survive

Still actively used 2 years after launch

2 in 100 deliver

On time, on scope, and within budget

94%

Abandoned, over budget, or never reached scale

Revenue breakdown

Where the money comes from.

Four lines, one clear leader. Understanding the shape of revenue tells you where to invest next.

38%

SaaS subscriptions

Annual and monthly recurring contracts

22%

Professional services

Implementation, onboarding, and consulting

19%

Licensing

White-label and API access fees

12%

Support & maintenance

Ongoing SLAs and dedicated support tiers

9%

Other

Our track record

Clients that come back.

We measure the quality of our work not just by what ships, but by whether clients want to come back. Over seven years and dozens of engagements, the answer has been the same.

Our track record

Clients that come back.

We measure the quality of our work not just by what ships, but by whether clients want to come back. Over seven years and dozens of engagements, the answer has been the same.

458 of 478 projects delivered on time

Every engagement since 2018, delivered on or ahead of the agreed deadline.

96%

Previous work

Redesigning finance for 2 million users.

We partnered with a European neobank to overhaul their mobile experience — from information architecture through to a fully shipped design system and production app.
